transcript:
Q1: Hi Yatharth, Yatharth, Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients/customers did you work with and what services/activities did you perform?
A1: Hi Yatthard. Yatthard, have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients customers did you work with and what services activities did you perform? Uh, not officially. Uh, I have helped family here and there. I'm a quick learner so I can figure it out on the spot.

Q2: Yatharth, Imagine you're finding a caregiver for a loved one. What traits or skills would be most important?
A2: Someone who gets things done fast and doesn't make a big deal out of small stuff.

Q3: Yatharth, How has your prior work or life experience helped you build the skills to be a good caregiver?
A3: Can you repeat your question?

Q4: Yatharth, Why do you want to be a caregiver? What are the most rewarding aspects of the job?
A4: Can you repeat your question, the previous question?

Q5: Yatharth, Tell me about a time when being late caused problems for you or your team. What did you learn?
A5: [No response recorded]
